name: markdownlint
description: Markdown linting, formatting, and conversion tools (markdownlint, pandoc, markdown-it)

subcommands.name: lint
subcommands.description: Lint markdown files for style violations

subcommands.name: convert
subcommands.description: Convert markdown to other formats using pandoc

subcommands.name: render
subcommands.description: Render markdown to HTML with markdown-it

subcommands.name: toc
subcommands.description: Generate table of contents for markdown file

subcommands.name: check-links
subcommands.description: Check for broken links in markdown files

globalOptions.name: --ignore
globalOptions.description: Glob pattern of files to ignore
